title: 3 Money Lessons From Families in Debt

segments.text: Debt can be a heavy burden on families.
But learning how to escape can empower them.
Create a budget to identify the real costs.
Paying off debt is a marathon, not a sprint.
And the best part? It's never too late to start.
Follow for the money mindset they don't teach you.

description: Debt impacts families deeply, but learning is key to overcoming it! Follow for daily money wisdom! 💰
